_style: Match the provided reference (inspiration/perfect-fantasy-rpg-...jpg) as EXACT style law: carved gold-and-dark-iron UI chrome, ornamentation density, bevels, rivets, near-black + warm-gold palette with restrained blue accents. Head-on orthographic flat game-UI asset.
_rules: Every asset is a single isolated component on a fully transparent background (no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements), centered, symmetric.

assets.name: panel-frame
assets.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the EXACT style guide, create a single isolated rectangular UI panel frame — BORDER ONLY. Reproduce the reference's panel-border art faithfully: the same carved gold-and-dark-iron material, ornamentation density, beveled molding, corner rivets/bosses, thin bright gold inner lip, and color palette. The CENTER MUST BE COMPLETELY HOLLOW and fully transparent — only the frame border exists, the entire middle is transparent (no fill). Perfectly symmetric on all four sides. Head-on orthographic flat view. Fully transparent background, no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements, isolated, centered.

assets.name: button
assets.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the EXACT style guide, create a single isolated horizontal UI button plate in the reference's exact style: a beveled dark-iron slab with an aged-gold rim and gold corner caps, soft warm top highlight, matching the reference's buttons in material, ornamentation, and palette. Empty center for a label. Head-on orthographic flat view. Fully transparent background, no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements, isolated, centered.
